author: mysticryuujin
content: btw, Nethermind Hive config is here: https://github.com/ethereum/hive/blob/master/clients/nethermind/test.json

author: mysticryuujin
content: But I'm not sure there's a way to modify the config for json-rpc compat only

author: mysticryuujin
content:
```
  Option 1: Add a custom HIVE_ env var (recommended)

  Add a new environment variable to forkenv.json and handle it in mkconfig.jq. For example, if you wanted to change a Nethermind JsonRpc setting:

  1. In simulators/ethereum/rpc-compat/tests/forkenv.json, add your custom variable:
  "HIVE_NETHERMIND_MY_SETTING": "value"

  Option 2: Set the env var directly in main.go

  Instead of putting it in forkenv.json, you can modify clientEnv in the rpc-compat simulator's main.go after loading it:

  clientEnv.Set("HIVE_NETHERMIND_MY_SETTING", "value")

  This keeps the change entirely within the simulator code.
```

author: mysticryuujin
content: That seems like it might work
